message:
fix(docs): use canonical scripts/install.sh path in README hero one-liner

The top-of-file install one-liner pointed to `main/install.sh` (the
83-line stub) while the Installation section correctly used
`main/scripts/install.sh` (the 738-line full-featured installer).
Align the hero block to the canonical path. Fixes #6.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ ```bash -curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/storage_ballast_helper/main/install.sh | bash +curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/storage_ballast_helper/main/scripts/install.sh | bash ``` Cross-platform disk-pressure defense for AI coding workloads: predictive monitoring, safe cleanup, ballast release, and explainable policy decisions.
